title: Umea Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Umea, with a Z-Score of -3.71. The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10 and a CRITICAL level.
body:
The current weather conditions in Umea are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 14.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 70%, and the wind speed is moderate, at 7.9 km/h. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with no Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value recorded, indicating no need for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
